scripts.workspace:links: ln -sfn ../../node_modules apps/api/node_modules && ln -sfn ../../node_modules apps/web/node_modules && ln -sfn ../../node_modules packages/contracts/node_modules
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres minio caddy
scripts.build: bun run build:contracts && bun run build:api && bun run build:web
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:contracts && bun run typecheck:api && bun run typecheck:web
scripts.verify: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run astro:check && bun test && bun run build:web && bun run build:api
